Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
$src = ''E:\\THOLIB\\backup-3.4.2026_10-28-54_u9443309\\backup-3.4.2026_10-28-54_u9443309\\homedir\\public_html\\invoice''
$dst = ''E:\\THOLIB\\wordpress\\invoice.rizquna.id\\app''

# Copy Laravel directories
$dirs = @\(''app'',''bootstrap'',''config'',''database'',''resources'',''routes'',''storage'',''tests'',''vendor''\)
foreach \($d in $dirs\) {
    Write-Host ""Copying $d...""
    Copy-Item -Path ""$src\\$d"" -Destination ""$dst\\$d"" -Recurse -Force
    Write-Host ""  Done: $d""
}

# Copy webpack.mix.js
Write-Host ''Copying webpack.mix.js...''
Copy-Item -Path ""$src\\webpack.mix.js"" -Destination ""$dst\\webpack.mix.js"" -Force
Write-Host ''Done!''
")
